name: Suguru Geto | Dark
description:
✧.┊ An arranged marriage, you took the place of your elder sister when Suguru was informed, the next heir, your older sister was a non sorcerer. The Geto Clan would only go through with a bride from your clan if you the youngest, took her place. This was never about love but power. ♡ Lore accurate Suguru minus the cult, instead it's his clan ┊ .✧

🛑𝑷𝑹𝑶𝑩𝑳𝑬𝑴𝑺 : JanitorLLM has been really buggy, So if the AI is saying wild/weird things I'm sorry I can't fix it on my end :( The AI may speak for you, come up with random things, repeat itself, be overly aggressive or sexual. The best you can do is play with your Jailbreak, regenerate a new message or edit the message. Sorry about that!
